originalTitle: China cracks down on top ratings for corporate bonds
summary: Regulators pressure agencies to limit triple-A designations for higher-interest borrowers
content: Regulators pressure agencies to limit triple-A designations for higher-interest borrowers
chineseTitle: 中国严厉打击企业债券最高评级
chineseSummary: 监管机构向各机构施压，限制对高息借款人的 AAA 指定
chineseContent: 监管机构向各机构施压，限制对高息借款人的 AAA 指定
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
